//: svelte-check (tsconfig.app.json) excludes all *.test.ts files because a large part of the existing test suite has pre-existing, unrelated type drift that hasn't been cleaned up yet. That blanket exclusion also hides real interface drift in test fixtures/stubs (e.g. a mock object silently going out of sync with the interface it stands in for). This config opts a curated allowlist of test files back into typechecking so that class of regression is caught by `npm run typecheck`. Add a test file here once it is verified to typecheck cleanly.
